name: migration: writes _meta/migration-from-rubric-yaml.md describing the migration (date, source rules, target files)
command: mkdir -p rubric tree && echo "rules: []" > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD" --emit-tree "$PWD/tree" && [ -f tree/_meta/migration-from-rubric-yaml.md ] && grep -E '^# Migration from rubric/RUBRIC.yaml' tree/_meta/migration-from-rubric-yaml.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
